name: VerifyLicenseKeyDelegate
summary: Called by Rhino to verify a license key. For details, see http://developer.rhino3d.com/guides/rhinocommon/rhinocommon-zoo-plugins/
delegate_signature: public delegate ValidateResult VerifyLicenseKeyDelegate( string licenseKey, string validationCode, DateTime validationCodeInstallDate, bool gracePeriodExpired, out LicenseData licenseData )
